config for datetime formatting
configzT
: boolean
    When True, prints and parses dates with the day first, eg 20/01/2005
: boolean
    When True, prints and parses dates with the year first, eg 2005/01/20
displayZ
date_dayfirstF)
Z	validatorZ
date_yearfirstN)
